title: Linked boards are not updated
excerpt:

I linked one item.

posts.author: Jiri (Jiri Huna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I created a connection between the two boards.
I linked one item.
Then I deleted this item on one board
But on the second board, the item was still attached, even though it no longer existed.
It’s a problem because we use it for statistics. Do you know how to solve it?

Thanks

deals728×332 17.4 KB

posts.author: GoldNetAU (Shaun Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same problem - except i didn’t realise the links were retained to deleted items much later after I had boards setup. now i cant fix it either.

i am in the habit of unlinking items before deleting but that’s not a workable solution either.
